title: Add Tauri iOS mobile support foundation

acceptance_criteria.text: Initialize first-class Tauri iOS support after the Android foundation, without introducing a PWA or alternate architecture.
Add documented iOS development and build commands that follow the Tauri mobile CLI path.
Verify the iOS app launches in Simulator or on a physical device and renders the SkillForge Academy shell.
Verify bundled certification content loads on iOS for A+, Network+, and Security+ without network access.
Verify learner state persistence on iOS for progress, notes, bookmarks, settings, and active track selection.
Make the core study flows usable on iPhone-sized and iPad-sized touch viewports, building on the Android responsive work from 217.
Define and validate iOS backup/export/import behavior under iOS sandbox/document-picker rules, or explicitly record the platform blocker and mitigation.
Document Apple Developer, signing, provisioning, and App Store/TestFlight requirements separately from Windows code-signing item 212.
Run the standard validation gates plus an iOS dev/build gate, documenting any macOS/Xcode/account dependency that prevents local execution.

source: User request: direct Tauri mobile support, iOS after Android
